_meta.instructions: Ground-truth user profile. Background agents read this every session and must NEVER overwrite fields listed in constraints.never_overwrite without explicit user verification. Copy this file to core_profile.json and fill it in; the real file is gitignored so your identity never enters version control.

stylistic_fingerprint.tone: how you want the assistant to write to you
stylistic_fingerprint.writing_voice: notes on your own writing voice
